name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: Click any stat card to see a money-in vs money-out summary for the period you picked — how many credits and debits, and their totals.
The Store card also shows your current store balance and the closing balance as of the selected date.
The Search page shows the same summary (plus store balance) above the results whenever you filter by date.
